Requirement (What): The binary image stored in flash memory initializes the device at startup, directly interfaces with hardware registers, and operates independently of any operating system.
Justification (Why): Align with HP's corporate goal to increase recycled content plastic to 30% by product weight by 2025.

Requirement (What): Develop carriage dynamic and force model considering tube routing and new weights.
Justification (Why): To ensure print quality and mechanical reliability.
New Threshold (Acceptable to Ship): Carriage operates within mechanical tolerances and print quality standards.
Target (Design Goal): Carriage operates within mechanical tolerances and print quality standards.

Requirement (What): Expand Continuous Ink Supply System (CISS) profitable market share by targeting new customer segments.
Justification (Why): To increase revenue and market penetration.

Requirement (What): Optimize warranty life to 80K pages, throughput to 25/20 ppm, serviceability of ink maintenance box, SMB solution, and PaaS schedule.
Justification (Why): To balance performance, service, and market needs.
New Threshold (Acceptable to Ship): Performance and service targets met as per schedule.
Target (Design Goal): Performance and service targets met as per schedule.
